subject: [SO] Kohn release image updates
commit_message:
[SO] Kohn release image updates

Kohn release image updates - for test purpose only so far.

Issue-ID: SO-3993
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@t-mobile.pl>
